data.content: Implementation review rejected. Violations: (1) TypeScript quality gate fails — src/lib/__tests__/create-draft-persistence-contract.test.ts:71 uses /s (dotAll) regex flag which requires ES2018+ target; tsc --noEmit produces error TS1501. Fix: replace /variant="outline".*onClick={onClear}/s with a dotAll-free pattern like /variant="outline"[\s\S]*onClick={onClear}/. (2) Unrelated diff included: settings-pools-section.tsx layout change (grid→flex) and deletion of settings-pools-layout.test.ts are not part of this beat's scope. All other acceptance criteria are met — persistence, restore, Clear button, and submit cleanup logic are correct.
